doctrine.macro_equivalence_threshold: Use a generic alias when the food is the same practical food, the prep state matches, and calories are within about 10% or 10 kcal per 100g with no structural macro difference.
do_not_collapse: whole egg vs yolk or white
pickled vs raw when sodium/prep matters
